1.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God

2.gl: a plan, usually evil (machination), sometimes good (sagacity)

2.gl: arrogance or majesty; by implication, (concretely) ornament

2.gl: morally wrong; concretely, an (actively) bad person

18.kj: another, [idiom] (blood-) thirsty, certain, chap(-man); divers, fellow, [idiom] in the flower of their age, husband, (certain, mortal) man, people, person, servant, some ([idiom] o
18.dv: from H605 (אָנַשׁ); properly, a mortal (and thus differing from the more dignified H120 (אָדָם)); hence,

18.gl: to add or augment (often adverbial, to continue to do a thing)
18.kj: add, [idiom] again, [idiom] any more, [idiom] cease, [idiom] come more, [phrase] conceive again, continue, exceed, [idiom] further, [idiom] gather together, get more, give more-ove

18.gl: to judge, i.e. pronounce sentence (for or against); by implication, to vindicate or punish; by extenssion, to govern; passively, to litigate (literally or figuratively)
18.kj: [phrase] avenge, [idiom] that condemn, contend, defend, execute (judgment), (be a) judge(-ment), [idiom] needs, plead, reason, rule.

18.gl: the earth (at large, or partitively a land)
18.kj: [idiom] common, country, earth, field, ground, land, [idiom] natins, way, [phrase] wilderness, world.
18.dv: from an unused root probably meaning to be firm;

18.gl: to awe or (intransitive) to dread; hence, to harass
18.kj: be affrighted (afraid, dread, feared, terrified), break, dread, fear, oppress, prevail, shake terribly.

18.gl: properly, a failure; by implication nothing; usually (adverb) not at all; also lest
18.kj: lest, neither, no, none (that...), not (any), nothing.
